fields.name: slug
fields.label: URL Slug
fields.helpText: The URL path for this page, e.g. "about-us". Auto-derived from the title.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Page Title
fields.helpText: Shown in the browser tab and as the page heading.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Short Description
fields.helpText: Appears in Google search results. Keep it under 160 characters.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Page Content
fields.helpText:
Supports HTML. Use

for paragraphs, for bold, for links.
